sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Global X S&P 500 Catholic Values ETF (CATH) stock price, news, quote and history
feed.summary: This article provides detailed financial information for the Global X S&P 500 Catholic Values ETF (CATH), including its current stock price, historical data, performance overview, and holdings. The ETF screens companies based on Catholic values as outlined by the United States Conference of Catholic Bishops. It also lists related tickers and market performance for various other ETFs and indices.

feed.title: Bassett Reports Fiscal Q1 2026 Results - Furniture World Magazine
feed.summary: Bassett Furniture Industries, Inc. reported a 2.2% decrease in consolidated net sales for fiscal Q1 2026, totaling $80.3 million, with diluted earnings per share falling to $0.13. The company attributes the slowdown to a weak residential housing market and severe weather in January, despite a strong President's Day event. Bassett plans continued investments in new retail locations and expects cost-saving initiatives to yield $1.5 to $2.0 million annually.

feed.title: Diabetes device recall surge reveals a worrying information gap
feed.summary: The article highlights a significant increase in diabetes device recalls, particularly for continuous glucose monitors (CGM) and insulin pumps, indicating a growing problem in the medical device industry. This surge in recalls suggests a concerning information gap related to the safety and efficacy of these essential medical devices. The report mentions specific Class I and Class II recalls in 2025 involving major companies like Abbott Laboratories, Tandem Diabetes Care, Dexcom, Medtronic, and Insulet Corp.

feed.title: Goldman Sachs Reinstates Fifth Third Bancorp (FITB) at Buy
feed.summary: Goldman Sachs has reinstated coverage on Fifth Third Bancorp (NASDAQ: FITB) with a Buy rating. This analysis comes from Goldman Sachs analyst Ryan Nash and is available as a premium article on StreetInsider.com.

feed.title: Prudential Advisors adds two seasoned recruits overseeing $300M in client assets
feed.summary: Prudential Advisors has recruited two experienced financial advisors, Keith Loegering and Brian Montalbano, who collectively manage over $300 million in client assets. Loegering joined the Pacific Financial Group from RBC Wealth Management, while Montalbano, previously with Synovus Securities, joined the Greater Florida Financial Group. Both advisors were attracted to Prudential Advisors for increased flexibility, enhanced technology, strong operational support, and growth opportunities as the firm continues its recruitment drive.

feed.title: Linde plc / IE000S9YS762
feed.summary: Linde plc (Nasdaq: LIN) has announced its first-quarter 2026 financial results will be released on Friday, May 1, 2026, by 06:00 EDT/midday CEST. The company will host a conference call and webcast at 09:00 EDT/15:00 CEST to discuss these results. Linde, a global industrial gases and engineering company with 2025 sales of $34 billion, provides high-quality solutions across various industries to make the world more productive.

feed.title: Alloy Therapeutics Enters into Multi-Target Collaboration and License Agreement with Biogen for Use of Alloy’s AntiClastic™ ASO Platform
feed.summary: Alloy Therapeutics has announced a multi-target collaboration and license agreement with Biogen for the use of Alloy’s AntiClastic™ ASO Platform. This collaboration aims to accelerate the development of innovative oligonucleotide therapeutics, building on previous work between the two companies. Alloy will receive an upfront payment and is eligible for milestone payments and royalties on products developed using the platform, which is designed to overcome potency and therapeutic index challenges in antisense therapeutics.

feed.title: Airrived Named Among Only 11 Startups in Gartner’s “Emerging Tech: AI Vendor Race — Startups to Watch in Agentic AI”
feed.summary: Airrived has been recognized by Gartner as one of only 11 startups globally in their report, “Emerging Tech: AI Vendor Race — Startups to Watch in Agentic AI.” Airrived is highlighted as the sole agentic AI platform specifically designed for cybersecurity and IT operations, emphasizing its Agentic OS as a foundational layer for autonomous AI that executes, adapts, governs, and scales with trust. The company is already deployed in production at major enterprises, demonstrating the immediate applicability and reliability of its technology.

feed.title: Prudential Advisors welcomes two advisors with over $300M in assets
feed.summary: Prudential Advisors has announced the addition of two financial advisors, Keith Loegering and Brian Montalbano, who collectively bring over $300 million in client assets. Loegering joins the Pacific Financial Group from RBC Wealth Management, while Montalbano, formerly with Synovus Securities, joins the Greater Florida Financial Group. Both advisors sought greater independence, support, and growth opportunities, reinforcing Prudential Advisors' strategy to attract established professionals.

feed.summary: Prudential Advisors has announced the addition of financial advisors Keith Loegering and Brian Montalbano, bringing over $300 million in

feed.title: Chunghwa Telecom (NYSE: CHT) plans Q1 2026 call, related-party lease deal
feed.summary: Chunghwa Telecom announced an upcoming investor teleconference on its Q1 2026 results scheduled for May 7, 2026. Additionally, its subsidiary, Honghwa International Corporation, is acquiring a right-of-use office asset from Chunghwa Telecom in New Taipei City. This related-party transaction involves a lease for 1,312 pings at NT$918 per ping per month, totaling NT$1,205,032 for the transaction, with board approval for the deal.

feed.title: How JELL-O turns crowd noise into a 10-point fan intensity score
feed.summary: JELL-O has launched the JELL-OMETER, a device designed to quantify fan intensity at sports events by converting crowd noise and excitement into "JELL-O Jiggles" (Js). This technology measures sound pressure and visually represents it on a scale of one to ten Js, providing a unique way to experience crowd energy. The JELL-OMETER debuted at a New York Islanders game, and JELL-O is now asking fans to suggest where it should go next.

feed.title: Savvy Advisors Inc. Raises Stock Holdings in U.S. Bancorp $USB
feed.summary: Savvy Advisors Inc. significantly increased its stake in U.S. Bancorp (NYSE:USB) by 244.4% in the fourth quarter, now owning 30,872 shares valued at $1.647 million. This comes as U.S. Bancorp surpassed Q4 earnings and revenue estimates and announced a quarterly dividend of $0.52 per share. Despite some insider selling, institutional ownership remains high, and analysts have a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating for the stock.

feed.title: HII Partners with GrayMatter Robotics to Enhance Shipbuilding with AI
feed.summary: HII has partnered with GrayMatter Robotics through an MOU to integrate Physical AI into shipbuilding processes, aiming for a 14% increase in throughput by 2025 and an additional 15% in 2026. While HII, the largest independent military shipbuilder in the US, demonstrates strong financial health with low bankruptcy risk, it faces challenges with declining margins and a valuation that appears high compared to historical averages. The collaboration seeks to enhance workforce capabilities, improve structural production, and accelerate unmanned systems development.

feed.title: Stratos Wealth Partners LTD. Has $2.99 Million Stock Position in Cummins Inc. $CMI
feed.summary: Stratos Wealth Partners LTD. increased its stake in Cummins Inc. (NYSE:CMI) by 49.1% in the fourth quarter, now holding 5,864 shares valued at $2.99 million. Analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating for Cummins, with several firms raising their price targets. The company recently surpassed quarterly earnings and revenue estimates and declared a $2.00 quarterly dividend.

feed.title: Savvy Advisors Inc. Boosts Stake in Exxon Mobil Corporation $XOM
feed.summary: Savvy Advisors Inc. increased its stake in Exxon Mobil Corporation by 33.1% in the fourth quarter, purchasing an additional 21,662 shares to own a total of 87,021 shares valued at approximately $10.47 million. While some analysts maintain a "Buy" rating and anticipate upside due to factors like LNG supply deals, others caution that the current stock rally may include a premium tied to geopolitical tensions that could reverse. Insider selling has also been observed, with a VP selling shares and other insiders disposing of a total of 11,460 shares recently.

feed.title: Savvy Advisors Inc. Acquires 2,368 Shares of Quanta Services, Inc. $PWR
feed.summary: Savvy Advisors Inc. has significantly increased its stake in Quanta Services (NYSE:PWR), boosting its holdings by 179.8% to 3,685 shares valued at $1.555 million. This comes as several analysts raised their price targets and ratings for Quanta Services, contributing to a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating. The construction company also reported strong Q4 results, surpassing revenue and EPS estimates, and provided positive FY2026 guidance.

feed.title: Wells Fargo, Citi Delay US Rate Cut Expectations
feed.summary: Wells Fargo Investment Institute no longer expects the US Federal Reserve to cut interest rates in 2024, citing persistent inflation, strong jobs data, and geopolitical uncertainty. Citigroup also adjusted its forecast, now anticipating rate cuts totaling 75 basis points spread across September, October, and December, a delay from its previous June, July, and September projection. Both institutions highlight ongoing inflation risks and a robust job market as key factors influencing the Fed's patience regarding rate adjustments.

feed.title: Daiwa Securities Adjusts Price Target on Citigroup to $134 From $138, Maintains Buy Rating
feed.summary: Daiwa Securities has revised its price target for Citigroup (C) to $134, down from the previous $138, while reaffirming a Buy rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects an updated outlook from the securities firm. The article, originating from MT Newswires, provides this specific analyst rating change for Citigroup.

feed.title: Applied Materials Inc. stock: Why it's a semiconductor powerhouse for investors now
feed.summary: Applied Materials Inc. (AMAT) is highlighted as a strong investment in the semiconductor industry due to its robust financial performance, including beating quarterly earnings and revenue expectations, and a recent 15% dividend increase. The company's critical role in supplying equipment for AI, EVs, and 5G technologies, coupled with strong analyst ratings, positions it as a key player for global investors seeking tech exposure and shareholder returns. While facing cyclical and geopolitical risks, its leadership in innovation and financial strength are seen as mitigating factors.

feed.title: Perpetual Ltd Has $6.43 Million Holdings in Exxon Mobil Corporation $XOM

The company holds a "Hold" consensus rating with a target price of $152.39 from analysts.

feed.title: SteelPeak Wealth LLC Reduces Stake in Teradyne, Inc. $TER

feed.title: BXM Wealth LLC Boosts Home Depot Stake by 437.5%

This acquisition boosts their total holdings by 437.5% to 6,052 shares, valued at $2,082,000, reflecting continued investor confidence in the home improvement retailer's market position and growth potential.

feed.title: Perpetual Ltd Has $334,000 Position in Devon Energy Corporation $DVN
feed.summary: Perpetual Ltd significantly reduced its stake in Devon Energy Corporation by 70% in Q4, selling 21,330 shares to hold 9,121 shares valued at $334,000. feed.title: A Look At Phillips 66 (PSX) Valuation After Recent Strong Share Price Performance
feed.summary: Phillips 66 (PSX) has shown strong share price performance recently, with gains of 6.9% over the past month and 29.8% over three months. Despite its current trading price of US$177.33, a popular narrative suggests the stock is 34% undervalued, with a fair value estimated at US$268.71. This valuation hinges on assumptions of modest revenue and net income growth, and a future P/E of 20.

feed.title: Is It Too Late To Consider KLA (KLAC) After A 156% One Year Surge?
feed.summary: KLA Corporation (KLAC) has seen a significant 156% surge over the past year, prompting an analysis of its current valuation. A Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) analysis suggests the stock is overvalued by 88.8% at its current price of US$1,540, indicating an intrinsic value of about US$815.86 per share. Similarly, its P/E ratio of 44.29x is above its calculated "Fair Ratio" of 35.87x, also suggesting overvaluation, although bull and bear case narratives offer different perspectives on its future fair value.

feed.title: Country Trust Bank Reduces Stake in ConocoPhillips
feed.summary: Country Trust Bank has reduced its stake in ConocoPhillips (NYSE: COP) by 4.1% during the fourth quarter, selling 8,701 shares. The institution now holds 201,435 shares valued at $18.86 million. This move reflects ongoing shifts in institutional investment strategies within the energy sector amidst changing market conditions.

feed.title: Autonomous Research Upgrades State Street to Outperform From Neutral, Adjusts PT to $149 From $143
feed.summary: Autonomous Research has upgraded State Street (STT) to "Outperform" from "Neutral" and increased its price target to $149 from $143. State Street Corporation is a financial holding company focused on investment services (82% of net sales) and investment management (18%), primarily serving institutions with custody, record-keeping, and asset management services. The upgrade reflects a more positive outlook for the company's financial performance.

feed.title: Wells Fargo Upgrades Old Dominion Freight Line to Equalweight From Underweight, Adjusts PT to $200 From $165
feed.summary: Wells Fargo has upgraded Old Dominion Freight Line (ODFL) to Equalweight from Underweight and increased its price target to $200 from $165. This change reflects a more positive outlook on the company. The article also mentions various other analyst adjustments for Old Dominion Freight Line, indicating active market analysis of its performance.

feed.title: Country Trust Bank Boosts Stake in WEC Energy Group
feed.summary: Country Trust Bank increased its stake in WEC Energy Group by 6.3% in Q4 2025, now owning 255,685 shares. This move reflects continued investor interest in established Midwest utility companies that are adapting to the changing energy landscape, particularly WEC Energy Group's focus on renewable energy and infrastructure upgrades. Investors are likely to continue monitoring WEC's stock performance as an indicator of the broader utility sector's health.

feed.title: Akamai Technologies Inc (AKAM) Stock Price Down 3.26% on Apr 6
feed.summary: Akamai Technologies Inc (AKAM) saw its stock price fall by 3.26% on April 6, closing at $114.15. Despite this dip, the stock remains significantly above its 52-week low and analysts rate it as an "Outperform" with an average target price near its current level. GuruFocus estimates a fair value for AKAM suggesting a small upside from its current trading price.

feed.title: Tema Etfs LLC Lowers Stock Holdings in Alphabet Inc. $GOOG
feed.summary: Tema Etfs LLC has reduced its stake in Alphabet Inc. ($GOOG) by 23.0%, selling 7,668 shares but still holding 25,622 shares valued at $8.04 million. Despite this, Alphabet exceeded quarterly earnings expectations with $2.82 EPS and $113.83 billion in revenue, showing strong growth and profitability. The company holds a consensus "Buy" rating with an average target price of $345.71, though significant insider selling in the last quarter could create short-term selling pressure.

feed.title: Scharf Investments LLC Trims Holdings in Alphabet Inc. $GOOG
feed.summary: Scharf Investments LLC reduced its stake in Alphabet Inc. (NASDAQ:GOOG) by 37.5% in the fourth quarter, selling 8,080 shares and retaining 13,447 shares valued at approximately $4.22 million. Despite insider selling activity, with 2,101,844 shares sold over the last quarter, Alphabet exceeded Q4 earnings expectations, reporting an EPS of $2.82 against an estimated $2.59 and revenue of $113.83 billion, an 18% year-over-year increase. Analysts maintain a "Buy" rating with an average price target of $345.71 for the stock.

feed.title: TB Alternative Assets Ltd. Increases Position in Alphabet Inc. $GOOG
feed.summary: TB Alternative Assets Ltd. significantly increased its stake in Alphabet Inc. (NASDAQ:GOOG) by 30.1% in the fourth quarter, making it their second-largest holding. This move aligns with several other large institutional investors who have also boosted their positions in Alphabet. Despite strong Q4 earnings, the company faces near-term pressures from planned large capital expenditures and notable insider selling.

feed.title: Devon Energy Merger Clearance Raises New Questions On Scale And Risk
feed.summary: Devon Energy has received regulatory clearance for its acquisition of Coterra Energy, bringing the merger closer to its Q2 2026 completion. This deal will create a larger U.S. oil and gas producer with an expanded asset base. Investors are encouraged to assess whether the increased scale and diversification outweigh the integration and balance sheet risks associated with such a significant merger.

feed.title: Evaluating Danaher (DHR) After Mixed Recent Returns And Conflicting Undervaluation Signals
feed.summary: Danaher (DHR) is currently facing mixed investor sentiment due to a year of positive returns contrasted with recent declines over the last three months and month, alongside a 4.5% uptick in the past week. Despite having a projected fair value of $264.91, suggesting it's 27.5% undervalued, other analyses indicate a 13.2% undervaluation but with an expensive P/E ratio. The article advises investors to further analyze the company's prospects given these conflicting signals and potential risks.

feed.title: Is Comcast (CMCSA) Now Offering Value After Recent Share Price Weakness?
feed.summary: Comcast (CMCSA) has experienced recent share price weakness, with declines across various periods. However, a Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) analysis suggests the stock is currently undervalued by 65.1%, with an intrinsic value of US$79.35 per share compared to its recent price of US$27.66. The article also explores narratives, offering bull and bear case valuations ranging from US$23.28 to US$68.19 per share, based on different growth and margin assumptions.

feed.title: Chubb’s Hormuz Role Adds New Dimension To Valuation And Risk Profile
feed.summary: Chubb (NYSE:CB) is participating in a U.S.-led insurance initiative to provide reinsurance for energy shipments through the Strait of Hormuz, coordinating with other major insurers and the US International Development Finance Corp. This involvement highlights Chubb's role as a significant player in large-scale risk transfer and adds a new dimension to its global footprint and risk profile. Investors should monitor how this exposure impacts Chubb's capital allocation and potential liabilities, especially given some recent insider selling.

feed.title: CMS Medicare Rate Decision Reframes UnitedHealth Group Valuation And Risk Profile
feed.summary: The CMS has finalized a 2.48% rate increase for 2027 Medicare Advantage and Part D payments, which is higher than initially expected and provides clarity for UnitedHealth Group, a major Medicare Advantage operator. This decision offers a more supportive baseline for Medicare Advantage profitability, despite ongoing questions about medical costs and competitive pressures. While the company's shares are considered undervalued by Simply Wall St, a flagged risk is UnitedHealth Group's high debt level.

feed.title: What Makes Synopsys Inc. (SNPS) Appear so Attractive
feed.summary: Synopsys Inc. (SNPS) is highlighted as an attractive AI chip stock, with Morgan Stanley maintaining an "Equal Weight" rating and a price target of $480, suggesting a more than 21% upside. The company's integration with Ansys is expected to achieve a $400 million cost synergy earlier than anticipated, and Synopsys recently executed an accelerated share repurchase agreement for $250 million. Synopsys develops intellectual property solutions and electronic design automation tools for the semiconductor and electronics industries.

feed.title: Arete Upgrades Analog Devices (ADI) to Buy
feed.summary: Arete has upgraded Analog Devices (ADI) from Neutral to Buy, setting a target price of $389, indicating a potential upside of over 22%. The upgrade is based on projected sales of $19.3 billion for fiscal year 2028, surpassing consensus estimates, driven by strong performance in automated testing, data centers, and automotive segments, and an anticipated AI capex cycle tailwind. Analog Devices is recognized for its integrated circuits, software, power management, and data converter technologies across various sectors.

feed.title: SLB’s New Digital and AI Deals Could Be A Game Changer For SLB (SLB)
feed.summary: SLB recently secured a three-year agreement with Azule Energy and expanded its AI collaboration with NVIDIA, signaling a deeper involvement in digital and AI services for the energy sector. These deals reinforce SLB's digital growth narrative, particularly through its "AI Factory for Energy" initiative. While promising for recurring revenue and offsetting traditional service volatility, investors should also consider the potential pressure on margins from rising R&D and digital investment costs, as well as the risk of accelerating decarbonization targets.

feed.title: Aberdeen Group Increases Stake in Halliburton
feed.summary: Aberdeen Group has increased its stake in Halliburton by 5.4%, purchasing an additional 26,543 shares during the fourth quarter of 2025. This move reflects the institutional investor's confidence in the oilfield services company's strong market position and growth potential, despite challenges in the broader energy sector. Aberdeen Group now owns 516,453 shares of Halliburton, valued at $14.6 million, representing approximately 0.06% of the company's outstanding shares.

feed.title: Securing the Agentic Enterprise: Check Point Unveils New AI Defense Plane
feed.summary: Check Point Software Technologies has launched its AI Defense Plane, a unified AI security control plane designed for the "agentic era" where AI systems act autonomously. This platform provides end-to-end protection across employee AI usage, AI applications, and agentic systems, integrating discovery, governance, observability, runtime control, and continuous validation. It aims to secure how AI behaves in production environments, moving beyond traditional model safety to address the expanded attack surface created by autonomous AI.

feed.title: Lineweaver Wealth Advisors LLC Has $12.35 Million Holdings in Microsoft Corporation $MSFT
feed.summary: Lineweaver Wealth Advisors LLC increased its stake in Microsoft Corporation (MSFT) by 10.1% in Q4, now holding 25,530 shares valued at $12.35 million. The article also details recent insider transactions, including an EVP selling shares and a Director buying shares, and highlights Microsoft's strong Q1 earnings beat with analysts maintaining a "Moderate Buy" rating and an average target price of $588.97.

feed.title: Oak Asset Management LLC Has $35.31 Million Stake in Apple Inc. $AAPL
feed.summary: Oak Asset Management LLC has slightly reduced its stake in Apple Inc. ($AAPL) by 1.6%, now holding 129,876 shares valued at $35.31 million, making Apple its largest portfolio position. The report highlights Apple's strong quarterly earnings, where it surpassed analyst estimates, and mentions recent insider stock sales by CEO Tim Cook and SVP Deirdre O'Brien. The article also touches on various analyst ratings and both positive and negative market sentiments impacting Apple.

feed.title: Retirement Systems of Alabama Acquires 8,202 Shares of Texas Pacific Land Corporation $TPL
feed.summary: Retirement Systems of Alabama significantly increased its stake in Texas Pacific Land Corporation by 199.1%, purchasing an additional 8,202 shares to bring its total holdings to 12,321 shares valued at approximately $3.54 million. The article also notes other institutional investors increasing their positions, while insider activity showed mixed signals with one CAO selling shares and a director buying. feed.title: Lineweaver Wealth Advisors LLC Grows Position in NVIDIA Corporation $NVDA

Despite significant insider selling, including a $7.46 million sale by CFO Colette Kress, analyst sentiment remains strong, with most maintaining "Buy" ratings and an average price target of $275.25, following NVIDIA's beat on quarterly EPS and revenue estimates.

feed.title: Retirement Systems of Alabama Sells 287,854 Shares of DuPont de Nemours, Inc. $DD
feed.summary: Retirement Systems of Alabama has significantly reduced its stake in DuPont de Nemours (NYSE:DD) by selling 287,854 shares, decreasing its holdings by 76.4% to 89,130 shares. Despite this sell-off, institutional investors collectively own 73.96% of the company's stock. DuPont recently delivered strong Q4 earnings, beating estimates, and has received largely positive analyst ratings with a "Moderate Buy" consensus and an average target price of $51.86.

feed.title: JPMorgan Chase CEO Said Stablecoins Are Creating Unprecedented Competition
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase CEO Jamie Dimon acknowledged that stablecoins and blockchain technology are creating unprecedented competition for the bank. He stated that the bank is now competing with "nontraditional fintech firms" in areas like payments, digital banking, and investments, forcing JPMorgan Chase to adapt with new solutions and investments in AI. Despite this competition, Dimon views the bank's size as an advantage and plans to continue expanding its presence in the crypto asset sector.
